description: Bubbles Fidget Headphone - Creatively combined with pop fidget elements on the side of the headphone, it features lots of sensory bubbles that helps to relax yourself by pressing them while you are listing to music or watching videos. A excellent BT headset as well as a perfect stress relief toy for you. Silicone Bluetooth Headset - Our rainbow color on-ear headphone adopts bluetooth 5.0 technology with built-in mic for stable signal, better noise reduction, and wonderful stereo system. The headset is made of high quality silicone and electronic components, lightweight for carrying and comfortable for using. 400mA Battery Capacity - Built-in 400mA battery, which can be used for up to 18 hours and standby for 48 hours. The headphone also features several buttons of plus, minus, pause/play which allows one-finger operation. Get this amazing bluetooth headset and be ready to enjoy yourself anytime and anywhere. Carry-On Fidget Headset - The creative combinaiton of classic headphone and cute pop fidget toy make this headset toy a wonderful one for both kids and adults. Easy to use and convenient to carry around you, great for daily, school, work, travel, etc. The beautiful color will make you look cool and fashionable. Best Gift and Rewards - The colorful wireless headphone is a perfect party favor or rewards for your kids on birthday, Children's Day, Christmas, etc. It is also a great gift choice for your mom, dad, boyfriend, girlfriend, besties, and so on. The blue and pink colors is designed for couples as well.
